name: AnalysisModelOutputProperties
summary: The AnalysisModelOutputProperties class contains information related to analysis model output properties.

constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisModelOutputProperties class

properties.name: OutputAnalysisResults
properties.summary: Indicates whether the analysis results are created.

properties.summary: Indicates whether the joint displacements are created.

properties.name: OutputMaterialProperties
properties.summary: Indicates whether the material properties are created.

properties.name: OutputMemberForces
